current_sprint.name: Sentinel Onboarding — End-to-End
current_sprint.status: PR #44 merged 2026-04-25 22:07 +0200 (commit 2b189e6) — backend (schema + signup + subscriptions + conversion + retention DB layer + retention cron + trial-expiry + /start handler + Valdí §263 hardening + pre-commit Codex gate) + SvelteKit signup-site slice 1 (landing/pricing/legal/magic-link landing) all on main. feat/sentinel-onboarding now 1 commit behind main, effectively closed. Next critical-path: browser-eyeball QA on slice 1, then SvelteKit slice 2+, operator console views V1–V6, Message 0 magic-link email sender.
current_sprint.notes: 2026-04-23 plan session produced 22 locked decisions (D1–D22), archived at ~/.claude/plans/i-need-you-to-logical-pebble.md. Key architectural commitments: Watchman = FREE 30-day trial (not 199 kr.); Sentinel = 399 kr./mo via Betalingsservice direct debit; one-click consent via MitID Erhverv (QES-grade, Danish-native); SvelteKit public site on Hetzner Cloud (EU residency); CVR-match domain verification (no DNS TXT / file upload); legal counsel re-targeted from Plesner to Anders Wernblad, Aumento Law. Tiered retention REVISED 2026-04-25 to Watchman zero-retention (immediate hard-purge at trial expiry, no anonymise stage, no tombstone — D16's literal '90d/365d' rejected as inconsistent with a free trial) and Sentinel 30d anonymise + 5y purge_bookkeeping (per Bogføringsloven). Valdí ruled `consent_records` is §263 evidence per GDPR Art 17(3)(e) — anonymise preserves structured PII; only `notes` scrubbed. Branch feat/sentinel-onboarding has ~22 commits (14 today): DB-layer additions, /start handler, retention cron (runner + actions + scheduler timer), trial-expiry scanner + reconciler, Codex pre-commit hook. 1,201 non-integration tests passing (+207 since 2026-04-18). 8 Codex passes drove 6 P1/P2 fixes in the retention slice before the gate returned clean. MitID Erhverv sandbox is free → dev unblocked during SIRI wait.

No Telegram send (telegram_chat_id=NULL). Architect APPROVE-WITH-CHANGES — single Python driver (no bash shim), no response cache, one wait. Surfaced TWO production bugs (filed as unresolved): ct_monitor commit-before-publish race + init_db not applying migrations. Wall-clock ~10s per run. Working tree uncommitted pending feature branch + PR covering all 2026-04-17 work.

milestones.name: Sentinel onboarding — plan locked + backend data layer + signup-site slice 1 (PR #44)
milestones.notes: PR #44 merged to main 2026-04-25 22:07 +0200. Plan session 2026-04-23: 22 decisions (D1–D22) locked across channel/message, consent/legal, state/data, website/payment. Full plan at ~/.claude/plans/i-need-you-to-logical-pebble.md (state machine, 12-message sequence DA+EN, integration architecture, cost math, critical path). Shipped: (1) docs sweep — Watchman = FREE across 10 files + Plesner → Aumento Law across 10 files + new decision log entry; (2) DB schema migration — 8 new clients columns + 6 new tables (signup_tokens, subscriptions, payment_events, conversion_events, onboarding_stage_log, retention_jobs) + 5 new indexes + validation updates; (3) onboarding-playbook.md + 2026-04-23 design section; (4) src/db/signup.py + 16 tests; (5) src/db/subscriptions.py + 24 tests; (6) src/db/conversion.py (17 event types incl. 7-row Sentinel consent audit trail) + tests; (7) src/db/retention.py (D16 tiered policy: Watchman immediate hard-purge, Sentinel 30d anonymise + 5y purge_bookkeeping; claim-lock helpers) + tests; (8) src/db/onboarding.py (activate_watchman_trial atomic transition) + tests; (9) src/retention/ execution cron (runner.py + actions.py — claim-lock, action handlers, Telegram alert at attempt 5, two-tier path-traversal guard, Valdí §263 evidence preservation in anonymise); (10) Telegram /start <token> handler; (11) trial-expiry scanner + reconcile_watchman_expired_orphans; (12) pre-commit Codex review hook (precommit_codex_review_guard.py); (13) SvelteKit signup-site slice 1 at apps/signup/ (8 routes: /, /pricing, /legal/{privacy,terms,dpa}, /signup/start magic-link landing — Vitest 9/9, signup-verify green); (14) verify scripts + Make targets (signup-{dev,build,test,verify,issue-token}). 1,201 unit tests passing.

milestones.name: Sentinel onboarding — slice 2 (operator console V1–V6 + signup site beyond landing + Message 0 sender)
milestones.notes: PR #45 (signup bilingual) merged 2026-04-26. PR #46 (`feat/operator-console-v1-v6`, operator console V1 trial-expiring + V6 retention queue tabs) merged 2026-04-27 16:09 UTC — V1+V6 tabs render in `main` but stay empty in DEV until DRYRUN-CONSOLE seed plan ships. PR #47 (`feat/dev-prod-bind-mount-separation`) open, 7 commits: original 4 (compose param + base-compose call-site protection / seed_dev_briefs + seed_dev_enriched + empty-input rejection in seed_dev_db / wire dev/prod isolation / docs + decision log) plus 3 new this evening (operator-console pipeline-progress emission + worker healthcheck heartbeat thread + dev subfinder tuning). Codex pre-commit drove 4 P1 + 7 P2 fixes across 7 passes for the M37 work + a closing class-fix sweep — iteration count flagged by Federico as antipattern, filed as anthropics/claude-code#53958. HEIMDALL_DEV_DATASET workaround retired. PR #47 dev-verified end-to-end: Live Demo lists 30 fixture briefs not 1,179, pipeline completes in ~30s with smoothly-moving progress bar (5%→77% over 28s, snap to 90/100), worker `/tmp/healthcheck` stays <30s old throughout. Awaiting Federico browser walk on dev → merge. **Architectural reframe queued:** architect memo + refinement memo delivered on bounded-contexts decomposition for the operator console (Tenant Identity / Findings Lifecycle / Onboarding & Conversion / Subscription & Billing / Retention & Compliance / Live Operations + Operator Identity & Audit cross-cutting + possible Notifications 7th context). `industries` ownership resolved 2026-04-27 to Tenant Identity (overriding the refinement memo's Reference Data framing). Four Federico decisions still outstanding: (1) Notifications as 7th context vs fold into Findings, (2) `config_changes` writes via repository-wrapper vs DB triggers, (3) RBAC+ table-backed access policy vs hard-coded role gates v1, (4) Stage A.5 as own sprint vs first half of V2's sprint. Architect recommends V2-V5 wait one sprint for Stage A foundation (operators/sessions/audit_log + auth + ticket + WebSocket gate + per-context router carve), then ship as proof of new context model in Stage C. Stage A.5 (command_audit + config_changes + RBAC tables + require_permission decorator + X-Request-ID middleware + trace_id propagation + /console/config/history) lands before V2-V5 begin. Soft-blocked items unchanged: MitID Erhverv broker pick (Idura / Criipto / Signicat — all sandbox-free), Betalingsservice merchant agreement (CVR-gated → SIRI-gated), CVR-match domain verification UX, signup site slice 2, Message 0 sender.

New counsel: Anders Wernblad, Aumento Law (Danish IT law specialist — member of Association of Danish IT Attorneys, IT Society, Network for IT contracts, Danish Bar). The 16-question briefing at docs/legal/legal-briefing-outreach-20260414.md is being re-sent to Wernblad. Briefing covers §263, outreach under Markedsføringsloven §10, NIS2/CRA applicability (citing LOV 434/2025 + CRA Article 14, 2026-09-11), GDPR DPA, MitID Erhverv one-click signing, and Betalingsservice mandate flow.
